untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of a 'White Candlestick' pattern near trend end with variable candle heights and average candle height measurement. No pattern recognition or statistical variance indicators are available in the allowed indicator set. Success rates, performance metrics, volume trends, and throwback/pullback percentages are marked AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be quantified. The pattern definition is too qualitative and context-dependent to translate into objective numeric rules.
translation_notes: Attempted basic directional logic based on candle body (white=bullish, black=bearish) and trend context (price vs SMA_20). However, the core pattern logic (variable heights, trend-end identification, average height measurement) cannot be expressed with allowed indicators. Book source indicates best performance in bear market after downward breakout; worst in upward breakouts, but quantitative thresholds are not provided.
